calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Stephen Becker, Esq. for Plaintiff: Becker Law Office, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Next Factors as follows:
Damages $73,364.50
Prejudgment Interest $1,107.00
Costs $387.06, for a total of $74,858.56
Judgment signed in open court.
